question.label: Ownership boundaries
question.name: Where are the ownership boundaries most blurred right now?
question.description: Pins down the specific decisions or interfaces where Lin becomes the default escalation.

answer: Next I want to hand off one stream end-to-end and stay out of the middle.

assessment.note: He named a concrete next move — handing off one stream end-to-end — which signals stronger ownership clarity and a growth-oriented delegation step. [THREAD-DEFERRED-WINDDOWN] 'hand off one stream end-to-end' could be worth unpacking next session.

new_queue.label: Load relief
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks lighter for you?

history.answer_excerpt: I am proud of the outcomes, but the pace should not be normal.
I still do not get enough substantive feedback on key decisions.
The last stretch shipped, but it was heavier than I made it sound.
Late nights came from carrying decision bottlenecks and final reviews.
Some of that work could have moved to the team sooner.
